rules.name: Color Contrast
rules.description: Ensure a minimum contrast ratio of 4.5:1 for normal text, 3:1 for large text.
rules.application: Verify all text-background combinations meet WCAG AA standards.
rules.example: Body text #333333 on background #ffffff provides 12.6:1 contrast ratio.

rules.name: Focus Indicators
rules.description: All interactive elements must have visible focus indicators.
rules.application: Use outline or ring styles for keyboard focus states.
rules.example: 2px blue outline offset by 2px on focused buttons and links.
rules.anti_pattern: Using outline: none without providing an alternative focus style.

rules.name: Text Alternatives
rules.description: Provide text alternatives for non-text content.
rules.application: Add alt text for images, labels for icons, captions for media.
rules.example: Decorative images with empty alt, informative images with descriptive alt.
rules.anti_pattern: Icon-only buttons with no accessible label or tooltip.

rules.name: Keyboard Navigation
rules.description: All functionality must be accessible via keyboard alone.
rules.application: Ensure tab order follows visual order; provide keyboard shortcuts.
rules.example: Modal dialogs that trap focus and can be closed with Escape key.
rules.anti_pattern: Dropdown menus that only open on mouse hover with no keyboard alternative.

rules.name: Error Identification
rules.description: Clearly identify and describe errors in form inputs.
rules.application: Use color, icon, and text to communicate error states.
rules.example: Red border, error icon, and descriptive message below the invalid field.
rules.anti_pattern: Only changing the input border to red without any error message.

rules.name: Motion and Animation
rules.description: Respect user preferences for reduced motion.
rules.application: Provide a reduced-motion alternative for all animations.
rules.example: Fade transitions that become instant transitions when prefers-reduced-motion is set.
rules.anti_pattern: Auto-playing animations that cannot be paused or disabled.

rules.name: Readable Font Sizes
rules.description: Minimum font size of 14px for body text, 12px absolute minimum for labels.
rules.application: Never use font sizes below 12px for any readable content.
rules.example: Body text at 16px, secondary text at 14px, small labels at 12px.
rules.anti_pattern: Using 10px font size for important information like prices or dates.

rules.name: Touch Target Spacing
rules.description: Maintain at least 8px spacing between adjacent touch targets.
rules.application: Add sufficient gaps between clickable items on mobile layouts.
rules.example: List items with 8px vertical gap between each tappable row.
rules.anti_pattern: Adjacent buttons touching each other with no gap, causing mis-taps.
